text:
Update available for Boost libraries. New upstream version: 1.56.0. Current ports version 1.55.0.

Ports affected (I think):
  devel/boost-all
  devel/boost-docs
  devel/boost-jam
  devel/boost-libs
  devel/boost-python-libs

http://sourceforge.net/projects/boost/
